segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm thinking about joining a gym. Do you have any suggestions? Yes, the fitness factory on main street is really good. They have a variety of classes and modern equipment. That sounds great. Do they offer personal training sessions? Yes, they do. The trainers are very capable. Perfect. I'll check it out this week.
